title: Timber price indices: data to March 2025
body: "This release is published twice a year and comprises the following price indices:   Coniferous Standing Sales Price Index, Softwood Sawlog Price Index (including spruce and other conifers sub-indices) Small Roundwood Price Index   The indices cover sales in England, Scotland and Wales by Forestry England, Forestry and Land Scotland, and Natural Resources Wales. "
